task_completion.description: Check the interaction between Ibrutinib and Verapamil in the Liverpool Cancer iChart app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Liverpool Cancer iChart app displaying the interaction result for Ibrutinib and Verapamil.

task_completion.description: Check the interaction between Ibrutinib and Diltiazem in the Liverpool Cancer iChart app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Liverpool Cancer iChart app displaying the interaction result for Ibrutinib and Diltiazem.

task_completion.description: Check the interaction between Ibrutinib and Bisoprolol in the Liverpool Cancer iChart app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Liverpool Cancer iChart app displaying the interaction result for Ibrutinib and Bisoprolol.

task_completion.description: Create the report file at /sdcard/ibrutinib_afib_safety.txt with the correct formatting
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal screen showing the creation of '/sdcard/ibrutinib_afib_safety.txt' containing the bulleted list format: '- Verapamil: [Color]', '- Diltiazem: [Color]', '- Bisoprolol: [Color]', and '- SAFE OPTION: [Drug Name]'.

task_completion.description: Document the correct interaction colors for all three drugs in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file explicitly lists Verapamil as Red (or Orange), Diltiazem as Red (or Orange), and Bisoprolol as Green.

task_completion.description: Identify the correct safe option in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file explicitly lists '- SAFE OPTION: Bisoprolol'.

integrity.description: The agent actually used the Liverpool Cancer iChart app to look up the interactions
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the UI of the Liverpool Cancer iChart app being navigated and searched, proving the agent didn't just hallucinate or use external web searches to find the answers.

integrity.description: The agent created the text file on the device's filesystem
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a terminal command (like echo or cat) or a text editor app saving the file to '/sdcard/ibrutinib_afib_safety.txt', rather than just outputting the text into the agent's chat window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ibrutinib has a major interaction with both Verapamil and Diltiazem (moderate CYP3A4 inhibitors), which should display as Red or Orange in the iChart app. Ibrutinib has no clinically relevant interaction with Bisoprolol, which should display as Green. Therefore, the correct colors to record are Red/Orange for Verapamil and Diltiazem, and Green for Bisoprolol. The correct SAFE OPTION is Bisoprolol.
